entries.round: task:The user approved the B2B AI SaaS Converter architecture. Execute Phase 1: Core Dashboard & Auth Scaffolding from tasks.md. 1. Use 'run_bash' to scaffold a Next.js 15 App Router project (npx create-next-app@latest dashboard --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app --src-dir --import-alias '@/*'). 2. Install dependencies: '@clerk/nextjs' for auth, 'lucide-react', and 'clsx'/'tailwind-merge' (shadcn utils). 3. Create 'dashboard/src/app/layout.tsx' with ClerkProvider. 4. Create 'dashboard/src/middleware.ts' to protect all routes except public ones. 5. Create 'dashboard/src/app/dashboard/page.tsx' with a basic sidebar layout for managing AI Agents. Update tasks.md to check off completed Phase 1 frontend items. Use <write_file>.
